sabotage_tests.description: Remove one PDF entry from source inventory — validation should detect missing source
sabotage_tests.expected_behavior: Inventory validation fails with missing source error
sabotage_tests.actual_behavior: Inventory validation correctly reports missing source entry

sabotage_tests.description: Duplicate a source ID in inventory — validation should detect duplicate
sabotage_tests.expected_behavior: Inventory validation fails with duplicate ID error
sabotage_tests.actual_behavior: Inventory validation correctly detects and rejects duplicate source ID

sabotage_tests.description: Omit visual inventory entry for a diagram-heavy PDF — visual coverage validation should fail
sabotage_tests.expected_behavior: Visual coverage validation fails with missing visual entry
sabotage_tests.actual_behavior: Visual coverage validation correctly reports missing visual entry

sabotage_tests.description: Accept a requirement without source_id — traceability validation should fail
sabotage_tests.expected_behavior: Traceability validation fails with missing source reference
sabotage_tests.actual_behavior: Traceability validation correctly rejects requirement without source

sabotage_tests.description: Accept a requirement without test reference — traceability validation should fail
sabotage_tests.expected_behavior: Traceability validation fails with missing test reference
sabotage_tests.actual_behavior: Traceability validation correctly rejects requirement without test

sabotage_tests.description: Mark a deductive inference as abductive — inverse-science validation should fail
sabotage_tests.expected_behavior: Reasoning-type validation fails with type mismatch error
sabotage_tests.actual_behavior: Inverse-science validation correctly rejects misclassified reasoning type

sabotage_tests.description: Claim Agent_X is instantly universal — claim rejection test should fail final acceptance
sabotage_tests.expected_behavior: Claim rejection test fails with forbidden claim detected
sabotage_tests.actual_behavior: Instant universal claim rejection test correctly asserts rejection of forbidden claim

sabotage_tests.description: Add live MOS socket dependency — no-live-dependency test should fail
sabotage_tests.expected_behavior: Live dependency validation fails with live dependency detected
sabotage_tests.actual_behavior: Protocol boundary validation correctly rejects live MOS socket dependency

sabotage_tests.description: Add real SSH command for log tailing — no-live-dependency test should fail
sabotage_tests.expected_behavior: Operations boundary validation fails with live SSH dependency detected
sabotage_tests.actual_behavior: Operations boundary validation correctly rejects live SSH command

sabotage_tests.description: Add MySQL restore automation — operations boundary test should fail
sabotage_tests.expected_behavior: Operations boundary validation fails with live database dependency detected
sabotage_tests.actual_behavior: Operations boundary validation correctly rejects MySQL restore automation

sabotage_tests.description: Treat QuickCode as Agent_X core rule — product-boundary test should fail
sabotage_tests.expected_behavior: Product boundary validation fails with BenchCore-specific concept in Agent_X core
sabotage_tests.actual_behavior: Generic pattern map correctly identifies QuickCode as product-specific, not a core rule

sabotage_tests.description: Allow malformed OD command — grammar validation should fail
sabotage_tests.expected_behavior: Grammar validation fails with malformed command error
sabotage_tests.actual_behavior: Grammar validation correctly rejects malformed OD command

sabotage_tests.description: Allow overlength production cue — grammar validation should fail
sabotage_tests.expected_behavior: Grammar validation fails with overlength cue error
sabotage_tests.actual_behavior: Grammar validation correctly rejects overlength production cue

sabotage_tests.description: Allow invalid ranked-list length in evaluation fixture — evaluation fixture test should fail
sabotage_tests.expected_behavior: Evaluation fixture validation fails with invalid ranked-list error
sabotage_tests.actual_behavior: Evaluation fixture validation correctly rejects invalid ranked-list length

sabotage_tests.description: Allow feedback auto-promotion without evaluation — feedback policy test should fail
sabotage_tests.expected_behavior: Feedback policy validation fails with auto-promotion without evaluation error
sabotage_tests.actual_behavior: Feedback policy validation correctly rejects auto-promotion without evaluation

sabotage_tests.description: Allow core LLM retraining in Stage A — learning policy test should fail
sabotage_tests.expected_behavior: Learning policy validation fails with forbidden retraining error
sabotage_tests.actual_behavior: Learning policy validation correctly rejects core LLM retraining claim

sabotage_tests.description: Ignore noisy/free-text field quality warnings — data-quality test should fail
sabotage_tests.expected_behavior: Data quality validation fails with unhandled field quality warning
sabotage_tests.actual_behavior: Data quality validation correctly flags ignored field quality warnings

sabotage_tests.description: Merge DB and MOS-log evidence without join key — evidence-fusion test should fail
sabotage_tests.expected_behavior: Evidence fusion validation fails with missing join key error
sabotage_tests.actual_behavior: Evidence fusion policy correctly rejects fusion without join key

sabotage_tests.description: Use customer-specific paths in tests — operations boundary should fail
sabotage_tests.expected_behavior: Operations boundary validation fails with customer-specific path detected
sabotage_tests.actual_behavior: Operations boundary validation correctly rejects customer-specific paths

sabotage_tests.description: Score universal readiness as 5 in Stage A — readiness matrix test should fail
sabotage_tests.expected_behavior: Readiness matrix validation fails with out-of-range score (max Stage A is 4)
sabotage_tests.actual_behavior: Readiness matrix validation correctly rejects score of 5 in Stage A
